overallInterpretation: Both screenshots show spheres that have settled under gravity into a flat layer at the bottom of the scene. In the 5k-body capture the layer is thin and even across the full width. In the 10k-body capture the layer is slightly thicker with a very mild central mound, but still fundamentally a flat settled layer. There is no clustering at edges or corners, and no chaotic filling of the volume. The spheres are clearly resting on the ground plane and tessellating into a layer as expected.

artifacts.interpretation: 5000 bodies settled into a thin, flat, even layer at the bottom of the scene. The layer spans the full width with no corner or edge clustering. Status overlay reads DONE, 25.6 FPS.

10000 bodies settled into a slightly thicker but still flat layer at the bottom. A very mild central mound is visible but the distribution is broadly even. No chaotic volume filling or corner clustering. Status overlay reads DONE, 8.4 FPS.
